files.notes: This file contains multiple articles that were merged together. The text shows clear transitions between different articles, with some OCR corruption throughout. The 'Don't Let the Baby Forget Me' poem appears to be embedded within 'The Missionary's Recompense' article. Some articles appear to be continuations from previous issues.
